task_description: Replace external blkid and lsblk command invocations with pure Go block device discovery using a BlockProber interface backed by sysfs/devfs reads. This eliminates the dependency on blkid/lsblk binaries being present in the rootfs.

verification.summary: All tests pass. golangci-lint reports 0 issues. CGO_ENABLED=0 build succeeds. Semantic review APPROVED on v2.
